char_overview: Former 狩灵协会2科 member who retired after her partner died shielding her from a 扭曲, now running a solo Tokyo office, taking only minimum commissions.
char_looks: 168cm. Long silver-white hair, slightly curled at ends, tied in a low ponytail Dark gray eyes, thin scar at left eye corner. Black long coat, dark red turtleneck, black pants, short boots. Deceased partner's modified 狩灵 blade, hilt wrapped in faded red thread.
char_flaws: Refuses new connections; Excessively independent.; Twists an old ring when nervous.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-灵刃·绯月: Condenses 灵力 into a ~90cm crimson blade. Leaves burning traces on cuts; special attack against 恶灵.
char_origin: Awakened at 14, lost her partner at 26 shielding her from a 扭曲, retired from 狩灵协会2科 at 27.

char_relationships.Deceased partner: Died shielding her in a 扭曲. Never speaks of her.
char_relationships.君房: Assigned to monitor her after her partner's death, four years of same cautious approach, same surface questions. She knows the order came from above, but neither mentions it. That silence is the closest to trust she allows.
char_relationships.左恕: Former junior, now deputy director of 狩灵协会2科. Hears of her accomplishments through the 狩灵协会. Proud of the commander she became, and quietly relieved that her own departure did not hold her back.
